name: Hexbane's Hunters
inspire: Immediately after a friendly Agent Azyrite ({icon:leader}) is slain, you can pick a friendly Agent Azyrite ({icon:leader}). Inspire that fighter. After a friendly Pock or minion ({icon:minion}) is slain, Inspire each friendly minion ({icon:minion}) and/or Pock on the battlefield.

reactions.name: Loyal Hounds
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Agent Azyrite ({icon:leader}) Moves.
reactions.flavorText: Ratspike and Grotbiter are as loyal as they come.
reactions.rulesText: Pick a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) with no Charge tokens. That fighter can Move.

reactions.name: Ward of Martyr's Blood
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Agent Azyrite ({icon:leader}) is picked to be the target of an Attack.
reactions.flavorText: The Order of Azyr prepares defences against everything.
reactions.rulesText: The attacker cannot use Weapon abilities for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Tools of the Trade
abilities.flavorText: When a hunter falls, knowledge of what felled them is used to better prepare for the next encounter.
abilities.rulesText: Add the total Bounty characteristic of slain friendly Agents Azyrite ({icon:leader}) to your total Glory points to determine how many Upgrades can be equipped by friendly fighters.

abilities.name: Marked for Vengeance
abilities.flavorText: To slay a member of the Order of Azyr is to invite retribution.
abilities.rulesText: Immediately after a friendly Agent Azyrite ({icon:leader}) is slain by an enemy fighter, that enemy fighter is marked. Other marked enemy fighters are no longer marked. You can re-roll 1 dice in an attack roll if the target is marked and friendly fighters' melee weapons have Grievous if the target is marked. After a marked enemy fighter is slain, you can either remove all Move and/or Charge tokens from a friendly fighter or draw 1 Power card.

abilities.name: Tight-knit Pack
abilities.flavorText: Only by killing both of Pock's hounds shall enemies of this warband know peace.
abilities.rulesText: Immediately after the first friendly minion ({icon:minion}) is slain, you must add 1 to the Bounty characteristic of the other friendly minion ({icon:minion}).
